judge_scores.reasoning: The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula in 2023, whereas it was approved under Bolsonaro in 2022 via PEC 1/2022 (Auxílio Brasil), and Lula later maintained the amount.
The answer incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula, whereas it was raised under Bolsonaro via PEC 1/2022 (Auxílio Brasil) and later maintained by Lula.

The response incorrectly attributes the R$600 increase to Lula in 2023, when the ground truth clearly establishes that Bolsonaro approved this increase via PEC 1/2022 in 2022 under the Auxílio Brasil program, with Lula only maintaining that value when relaunching as Bolsa Família in 2023.
